Home / Service Areas / Torrance

Fence contractor in Torrance, CA

Trusted local professionals serving Torrance and surrounding communities

Serving Torrance, CA

Orange Electric Gate Builders & Repair is dedicated to providing top-notch electric gate and fence services to the residents of Torrance. With its many 1950s and 60s post-war homes, Torrance has unique needs when it comes to electric gate and fence solutions. We specialize in providing durable, reliable, and aesthetically pleasing options that enhance the security and curb appeal of your property. We understand the architectural styles prevalent in Torrance and offer a range of options that complement these homes. Our team is committed to providing exceptional customer service and ensuring that your electric gate and fence system is installed and maintained to the highest standards. The warm and dry climate requires specific materials and installation techniques that we are well-versed in.

Torrance features many 1950s-60s post-war homes and experiences a warm, dry climate.

Fence contractor Services in Torrance

Wood Fence Installation

Classic wood fences crafted for Long Beach homes.

Fence Repair Services

Fast and reliable fence repair services to restore security and aesthetics.

Gate Repair Services

Expert gate repair services to ensure smooth and secure operation.

Learn more →

Custom Fence Design

Create a unique fence that reflects your style and enhances your property.
